active_profile_source: S09A selected control bundle plus active target-unit packet policy; no global venue/profile default
producer_return_obligations: validate_packet-clean TaskPacket with packet identity and target unit
lossless selected_controls projection from S09A including usage labels and negative controls
material_read_obligations that later S10/S11 must acknowledge with read receipts
allowed paths, forbidden routes, worker boot clause, and no-completion boundary
single_writer_lock, stale policy, return_format, and emitted_packet_validation evidence
missing_material_report that blocks candidate production when closure is incomplete

checks: packet is not a generic prompt and preserves S09A selected_controls losslessly
unit_material_closure, material_access_manifest, and material_read_obligations are exact and closed
allowed paths and write lock are scoped to the target unit
worker boot clause forbids completion claims, recursion, and owner-intent changes
missing material blocks S10/S11 instead of being hidden as optional context

downstream_design_force: S10/S11 producers must receive all controls, material_read_obligations, and return obligations in the packet
S10/S11 verifiers must compare read receipts and candidate outputs against S09B material closure
S12/S13/S16 and RenderedManuscriptAuditGate can audit whether generated units obey the exact packet obligations

failure_severity_policy.BLOCKING: packet omits material closure, read obligations, authority boundary, or validation evidence
failure_severity_policy.MAJOR: packet compresses selected controls into generic guidance or loses S09A usage labels
failure_severity_policy.MINOR: local path label, return-format, or lock metadata defect without authority expansion
failure_severity_policy.WATCH: non-blocking downstream usability concern tracked for verifier attention

nearest_responsible_stage_policy: S09B owns packet compilation defects; missing selected controls route to S09A, missing source/design material routes to its concrete upstream stage.
anti_over_strictness_boundary: MINOR/WATCH metadata defects can be repaired in the packet locally; do not force S04-S08 reruns unless selected controls or material closure are substantively wrong.
